description: Slice 'Fund Deposit' amended: new field 'depositChannel' added + new spec 'isDuplicateTransaction' with empty then[]. Hash drift should be detected if implementation-hashes.json exists.

expected_statuses_no_hashes._note: If no implementation-hashes.json exists, Pass 4 cannot detect drift. Fund Deposit code exists so Pass 1 sets Review. The new field/spec go undetected — this is a known limitation.

expected_actions.reason: Spec hash drift: new field 'depositChannel' and new spec 'isDuplicateTransaction' added

expected_actions_no_hashes._note: Without implementation-hashes.json, no action is generated — code exists, status stays Review. The drift is invisible.
